resultList.dtldesc: Experience upscale living in one of Hyderabads rapidly developing residential corridors with this spacious 3 BHK apartment in Puppalaguda. Situated within the well-known project Aparna Zenon, the property offers a blend of modern design, expansive living spaces, and access to premium lifestyle amenities, making it an excellent choice for families seeking comfort and long-term value.Property SpecificationsThis unfurnished apartment spans a super built-up area of 2257 sq. ft, offering a generously planned layout that ensures both functionality and openness. The home comprises three well-appointed bedrooms and four bathrooms, catering comfortably to larger families. Positioned on the ground floor of a high-rise tower, the apartment provides easy accessibility while maintaining a sense of privacy within a gated setup. The unit includes three balconies that enhance natural light and ventilation throughout the living spaces. Designed with a practical layout, the apartment features a standard kitchen configuration and combined living and dining areas, allowing flexibility for interior customisation. The property is east-facing, which is considered favourable for natural light and airflow. Additionally, two covered car parking spaces are allotted, adding to everyday convenience.FacilitiesLocated within Aparna Zenon, the apartment benefits from a wide range of modern amenities and infrastructure. The gated community offers facilities such as multiple lifts, power backup, water supply, security systems, and well-maintained common areas. Residents also have access to lifestyle features including a clubhouse, swimming pool, gymnasium, landscaped gardens, indoor and outdoor sports facilities, and childrens play areas, ensuring a balanced and active lifestyle . The presence of six lifts in the tower enhances vertical mobility and convenience for residents in this large-scale development.LocalityPuppalaguda is emerging as a prime residential destination due to its proximity to key IT hubs such as Gachibowli and the Financial District. The area enjoys strong connectivity via the Outer Ring Road and other major arterial routes, making daily commuting efficient. The locality is surrounded by well-developed neighbourhoods including Manikonda and Jubilee Hills, adding to its residential appeal . Reputed schools, healthcare centres, and retail outlets are located within a short radius of around 3 km, while metro connectivity is also accessible within a reasonable distance, enhancing overall convenience. This strategic location, combined with robust infrastructure and growing demand, makes the property a promising option for both end-use and investment.
